title: prenanthes multiformis
intro: Prenanthes multiformis, also known as the variable knapweed or white knapweed, is a plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Prenanthes multiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate symptoms of fever and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding the plant for use in capsules or tinctures.
